query: AI OR LLM OR agent created:2024-02-01..2024-04-20 language:Python, sort=stars desc
note: Three daily captures of GitHub trending Python AI/LLM/agent repos. Star counts represent the value as of each capture day; same repo may appear on multiple days with different star counts. Each item carries a captured_on field.

items.name: opendatalab/MinerU
items.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.

items.name: openai/swarm
items.description: Educational framework exploring ergonomic, lightweight multi-agent orchestration. Managed by OpenAI Solution team.

items.name: Skyvern-AI/skyvern
items.description: Automate browser based workflows with AI

items.name: emcie-co/parlant
items.description: The interaction control harness for customer-facing AI agents - optimized for building controlled, consistent, and predictable customer interactions with LLMs.

items.name: PKU-YuanGroup/Open-Sora-Plan
items.description: This project aim to reproduce Sora (Open AI T2V model), we wish the open source community contribute to this project.

items.name: karpathy/minbpe
items.description: Minimal, clean code for the Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) algorithm commonly used in LLM tokenization.

items.name: SciPhi-AI/R2R
items.description: SoTA production-ready AI retrieval system. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with a RESTful API.

items.name: myshell-ai/MeloTTS
items.description: High-quality multi-lingual text-to-speech library by MyShell.ai. Support English, Spanish, French, Chinese, Japanese and Korean.

items.name: Zipstack/unstract
items.description: LLM-Driven Extraction of Unstructured Data — Built for API Deployments & ETL Pipeline Workflows

items.name: albertan017/LLM4Decompile
items.description: Reverse Engineering: Decompiling Binary Code with Large Language Models

items.name: lavague-ai/LaVague
items.description: Large Action Model framework to develop AI Web Agents

items.name: landing-ai/vision-agent
items.description: Vision agent SDK for image and video understanding tasks.

items.name: amazon-science/chronos-forecasting
items.description: Chronos: Pretrained Models for Time Series Forecasting

items.name: google-deepmind/gemma
items.description: Gemma open-weight LLM library, from Google DeepMind
